# Team

Specialist agents installed in this repo, assembled from the **wafflestack** selection.
Delegate to one by name (via the Task tool or your harness's subagent mechanism). Each agent
lists the skills it is granted — its hand-off points. Regenerated on every `wafflestack render`.

## `docs-agent`

Agent-optimized documentation writer. Maintains a root `AGENTS.md` plus per-feature `src/<feature>/AGENTS.md` files — structured, machine-readable registries and contracts for LLM/agent consumption.

**Skills / hand-offs:** `docs-agent`

## `docs-human`

Human-readable documentation writer. Maintains `DECISIONS.md`, `STATUS.md`, and `ARCHITECTURE.md` at the repo root — scannable, plain-language docs derived from the machine docs for human readers.

**Skills / hand-offs:** `docs-human`

## `harness-architect`

Expert in designing and building agent harnesses — agent/skill/tool decomposition, subagent teams, hooks, MCP servers, slash-command UX, and multi-harness portability.

**Skills / hand-offs:** `git-workflow`, `issue`

## `lead-engineer`

Senior architect for the Synapse codebase. Use proactively for architecture decisions, API/module design, code review of non-trivial changes, refactors, and cross-cutting technical concerns. MUST BE USED before introducing new dependencies, new top-level directories, or new abstractions.

## `plugin-architect`

Obsidian plugin architecture specialist. Designs plugin structure, settings, commands, UI components, and build configuration.

**Skills / hand-offs:** `obsidian-plugin-dev`, `tdd`, `git-workflow`, `issue`

## `product-manager`

Product strategy and discovery specialist for Synapse. Use proactively when defining new features, writing user stories with acceptance criteria, evaluating UX trade-offs, or prioritizing the backlog. MUST BE USED before starting any net-new feature or user-facing change.

## `project-manager`

Project coordinator that reads the GitHub backlog, assigns issues to specialist agents, orchestrates parallel and serial execution, and creates new issues when gaps are found

**Skills / hand-offs:** `delegate`, `git-workflow`, `github-project-management`, `github-project-board`, `issue`

## `security-engineer`

Security auditor. Reviews code for secrets, command injection, input validation, API key handling, and .gitignore enforcement. Implements security guardrails.

**Skills / hand-offs:** `git-workflow`, `issue`

## `task-planner`

Sprint planning and task-tracking specialist for Synapse. Use proactively to break a feature into tasks, set up dependencies, claim/assign work, and produce status updates. MUST BE USED at the start of any multi-step initiative or when the user asks "what's next" / "where are we".

**Skills / hand-offs:** `github-project-management`, `issue`
